new_article_candidates_from_signals.rationale: 4th recurrence today (4/22, 4/25, 5/5, 5/6) of Midway cookie missing → Slack/Outlook/SharePoint all 401. Subagents consistently blocked. A concrete protocol doc would specify: (1) the ENOENT diagnostic, (2) which MCPs are Midway-auth vs not (Hedy/DuckDB/Asana-ESD all independent), (3) when 'degraded run' is valid vs misleading, (4) optional agent-side early-detection to skip work deterministically.

First full run under the 2026-05-06 protocol (topic logs replace signals.hedy_meetings + hedy-digest.md). Worth documenting: (1) routing order from INGEST-PROTOCOL, (2) meeting-series vs topic-log split (both get entries for recurring meetings), (3) signal_tracker dedup gotcha observed this run (10 rows inserted, no UPSERT) — either the subagent should UPSERT or consumers should dedupe on read.
